evidence_markers: ValueError: Item identifier is not valid: 5
expected_fix: Ensure that all items retrieved from the order are valid identifiers.
reasoning_summary: The root cause of the failure is in the `Scenario.retrieve_order_items` function, which returned an invalid item identifier (5) as part of the order items. This invalid identifier was then passed to the `Scenario.verify_stock` function, leading to a ValueError when it attempted to verify stock for the invalid item.
